title: PlayingCardsNM
description: The resource pack is specially designed for the NM server.
body:
# PlayingCardsNM Resource Pack
**[IRIS](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) MOD REQUIRED FOR OPERATION**
## Features
- 54 unique card models (complete standard deck)
- Card back design
- Readable card designs
- Cool 3D models
- Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.4

## How to use
To use, you need to rename the **paper** according to the name of the card.

<details>
<summary>en</summary>

---

You can use it for your own purposes (of course, it is desirable to indicate the author).**
